title: Design System: HMD Secure AI-Native CRM

body.purpose: Dense operational content and readable prose.

label.purpose: Controls, metadata, table headers, and statuses.

shadows.name: drawer-edge
shadows.purpose: Separate an open drawer from the workspace.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and compact state transitions.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Drawers, disclosures, and larger state changes.

narrative.overview: HMD Secure supplies the industrial identity and direct operational tone. Attio supplies the reference for records, lists, saved views, inline editing, and context-preserving navigation. Clay supplies the reference for structured AI execution, row-level state, batch controls, provenance, and reviewable outputs.
rules: HMD Secure remains the visual and verbal identity.
Table and kanban are views over the same records.
Generated values remain distinct from confirmed CRM values.
Consequential AI output requires explicit review.
donts: Do not copy Attio or Clay branding, layouts, assets, icons, copy, or ornamental details.
Do not make chat the primary interface when an action belongs in structured data.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The highest-priority action in the current working context.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; background: #E4FF00; color: #0A0A0B; font: 650 0.8125rem/1.25 Archivo, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: #ECFF52; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E4FF00; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Working Panel
components.description: A grouped operational region, used only when containment improves comprehension.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #3A3A3D; border-radius: 8px; background: #242426; color: #FAFAFA; }
